title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 04 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 04 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 04 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 04/03/2026
Today, Dalian iron ore futures exhibited a predominantly sideways, oscillating trend. The most-traded I2605 contractclosed at 752 RMB per tonne, representing a marginal increase of 0.04% from the previous trading session. In the physical market, spot prices rose by 0-2 RMB from the prior day.
